ddls:
CREATE TABLE "violations" (
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each violation */,
  "violation_type" TEXT /* Type of violation (e.g., Initial Violations, Current Violations) */,
  "serious_count" INTEGER /* Count of serious violations */,
  "willful_count" INTEGER /* Count of willful violations */,
  "repeat_count" INTEGER /* Count of repeat violations */,
  "other_count" INTEGER /* Count of other types of violations */,
  "unclassified_count" INTEGER /* Count of unclassified violations */,
  "total_count" INTEGER /* Total count of violations */,
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the regulation associated with the violation */,
  "violation_date" TEXT /* Date the violation occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the violation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("violation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "penalties" (
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each penalty record */,
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the violation associated with the penalty */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Total penalty amount */,
  "serious_amount" TEXT /* Penalty amount for serious violations */,
  "willful_amount" TEXT /* Penalty amount for willful violations */,
  "repeat_amount" TEXT /* Penalty amount for repeat violations */,
  "other_amount" TEXT /* Penalty amount for other types of violations */,
  "unclassified_amount" TEXT /* Penalty amount for unclassified violations */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the penalty was paid */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the penalty payment (e.g., paid, pending, overdue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("penalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_violation_id FOREIGN KEY ("violation_id") REFERENCES violations ("violation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulations" (
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulation */,
  "regulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the regulation */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the regulation became effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the regulation expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance officer */,
  "officer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the compliance officer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the compliance officer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the compliance officer */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the compliance officer */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the officer started working */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "corrective_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each corrective action */,
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the violation that the action pertains to */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the corrective action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the compliance officer responsible for the action */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the corrective action (e.g., completed, pending, in progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corrective_actions_violation_id FOREIGN KEY ("violation_id") REFERENCES violations ("violation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the violation audited */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the audit */,
  "auditor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the auditor conducting the audit */,
  "findings" TEXT /* Findings from the audit */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations from the audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_violation_id FOREIGN KEY ("violation_id") REFERENCES violations ("violation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_auditor_id FOREIGN KEY ("auditor_id") REFERENCES auditors ("auditor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auditors" (
  "auditor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each auditor */,
  "auditor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the auditor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the auditor */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification held by the auditor */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of auditing experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("auditor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the violation associated with the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recipient of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_violation_id FOREIGN KEY ("violation_id") REFERENCES violations ("violation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the violation associated with the document */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., policy, procedure, report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_violation_id FOREIGN KEY ("violation_id") REFERENCES violations ("violation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., compliance officer, auditor, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance metric */,
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the violation associated with the metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the compliance metric (e.g., number of violations, penalty amount) */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the compliance metric */,
  "target_value" TEXT /* Target value for the compliance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_metrics_violation_id FOREIGN KEY ("violation_id") REFERENCES violations ("violation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Configuration of the dashboard (e.g., layout, charts, filters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_regulations" (
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external regulation */,
  "regulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the external regulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the external regulation */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the external regulation became effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the external regulation expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the training program starts */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the training program ends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)
